entry.title: New: BILL032(26) (Honolulu) — HHP
entry.content:
RELATING TO PUBLIC PARKS, RECREATIONAL FACILITIES, AND BOTANICAL GARDENS.

Repeals certain specific fees and charges for the use of public parks and recreational facilities. Authorizes the DPR Director to establish fees and charges by rule for the commercial and noncommercial use of parks; recreational facilities; and botanical gardens under the jurisdiction of the DPR and requires that the fees and charges collected (except those derived from the use of the Hanauma Bay Nature Preserve) be deposited into a fund designated by the DPR Director. Provides the DPR Director with rulemaking authority. Establishes reporting requirements. Takes effect 450 days after approval; provided that fees established by ROH articles and sections to be repealed will remain in effect until the DPR Director adopts rules.

Latest action: See: Proposed draft version OCS2026-0182/3/30/2026 2:35 PM Amended to CD1 and postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site
